A '''Rakatan Battle Wand''' was a [[Stun/Legends|stun]] weapon that was shaped only for the use by [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] hands and thus difficult for other [[Species/Legends|species]] to use.

{{Weapon-stub}}
